# TRTC Documentation

> TRTC (Tencent Real-Time Communication) provides SDKs for real-time audio/video,
> instant messaging, live streaming, and video calling across multiple platforms.

## Products

- [Live](https://trtc.io/llms/live.txt): Interactive live streaming with co-hosting, gifts, chat, and beauty effects
- [Chat](https://trtc.io/llms/chat.txt): Instant messaging with conversations, groups, and offline push
- [Call](https://trtc.io/llms/call.txt): 1v1 and group audio/video calling
- [RTC Engine](https://trtc.io/llms/rtc-engine.txt): Core real-time audio/video engine for room-based communication
- [Room](https://trtc.io/llms/room.txt): Room creation, destruction, and member management
